title: Chaenostoma dissectum
taxonomy: Chaenostoma dissectum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Chaenostoma, which is a part of the plant family Scrophulariaceae. Within the genus, C. dissectum is one of the several species, each with distinct characteristics. Chaenostoma dissectum is native to the mountainous regions of southern Africa. This classification helps in understanding its evolutionary history and relationship with other plants in the same family.
